scripts.dev: npm run dev:clean && npm run dev:start
scripts.dev:clean: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "try { $conn=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if ($conn) { taskkill /PID $conn.OwningProcess /F 2>$null | Out-Null } } catch {} ; exit 0"
